name: python3-memcache
title: python3-memcache
description:
pure Python memcached client - Python 3.x
This software is a 100% Python interface to the memcached memory cache daemon.
It is the client side software which allows storing values in one or more,
possibly remote, memcached servers.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-memcache because pure Python memcached client - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-memcache as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-memcache with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-memcache --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
